expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度] 和 [深度] 是整体尺寸，[板厚] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah Ukuran Keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Papan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah pengukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านบน, ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của chất liệu bảng phía sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Likod na Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်တစ်ခုအတွက်ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားများအားတွက်ချက်သည်။ [အကျယ်], [အမြင့်], [အနက်] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်ဘုတ်၊ အောက်ဘုတ်နှင့်ဘေးဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဘုတ်အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ។ [ទទឹង], [កម្ពស់], [ជម្រៅ] គឺជាប្លង់សរុប។ [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សំរាប់វត្ថុធាតុថ្នាំងលើ ទូនិងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាវត្ថុធាតុថ្នាំងពីក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ເຄົາລະນາຂະຫນາດຂອງແຜ່ນບອດສໍາລັບຕູ້ [ຄວາມກວ້າງ], [ຄວາມສູງ], [ຄວາມລຶກ] ເປັນຂະຫນາດລວມທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດສະດຸແຜ່ນເບື້ອງເທິງ, ຂ້າງລຸ່ມ ແລະຂ້າງຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງແຜ່ນພື້ນຫລັງ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板のサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体の寸法、[BoardThick] は上部、底部、側面の板の素材の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背景板の素材の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재질 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 뒷보드 재질 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Ober-, Unter- und Seitenplatten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [चौड़ाई], [ऊंचाई], [गहराई] कुल माप हैं, [बोर्ड मोटाई] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [पीछे बोर्ड मोटाई] पीछे बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - это толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] - это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
